{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2002}} {{Use dmy dates|date=December 2018}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 59th Venice International Film Festival |image = 59th Venice International Film Festival.jpg |image_size = |caption = Festival poster |opening = ''[[Frida (2002 film)|Frida]]'' |closing = ''[[Johan Padan and the Discovery of the Americas]]'' |location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] |founded = 1932 |awards =[[Golden Lion]]:
''[[The Magdalene Sisters]]'' |artistic_director= [[Moritz de Hadeln]] |host = |number = |date = 29 August–8 September 2002 |website = [http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/ Website] | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[58th Venice International Film Festival|58th]] | followed_by = [[60th Venice International Film Festival|60th]] }} The '''59th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 29 August to 8 September 2002, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite web|url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/history/recent-years|title=La Biennale di Venezia — The Recent Years: 1999 - 2020|date=10 April 2017 |access-date=9 October 2022}} Chinese actress [[Gong Li]] was the Jury President of the main competition. The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[The Magdalene Sisters]]'' by [[Peter Mullan]].{{cite web|url=http://www.americancinemapapers.com/files/Venice_2002_Lions_Lions.htm|title=LIONS, LIONS EVERYWHERE|access-date=6 October 2013}}{{cite web|url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=503&lang=en|title=The 2000s|date=19 April 2010 |access-date=8 October 2013}} ==Jury== The following people comprised the 2001 jury: === Main Competition === * [[Gong Li]], Chinese actress - Jury President{{cite web |title=Juries for the 2000s |url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170804133752/http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en |archive-date=4 August 2017 |access-date=4 April 2018}} * [[Jacques Audiard]], French filmmaker * {{Interlanguage link|Ulrich Felsberg|de}}, German film producer * [[László Kovács (cinematographer)|László Kovács]], Hungarian cinematographer * [[Francesca Neri]], Italian actress * [[Yeşim Ustaoğlu]], Turkish filmmaker * [[Yevgeny Yevtushenko]], Russian poet ===Luigi De Laurentiis Award for a Debut Feature=== * [[Katinka Faragó]], Swedish film producer - Jury President * [[Reinhard Hauff]], German filmmaker * [[Derek Malcolm]], English film critic * [[Paolo Virzì]], Italian filmmaker * Eva Zaoralova, Czech film critic ===Controcorrente=== * Ghassan Abdul Khalek, Lebanese film critic - Jury President * [[Catherine Breillat]], French filmmaker * [[Peggy Chiao]], Taiwanese filmmaker * Klaus Eder, German film critic * [[Enrico Ghezzi]], Italian film critic ==Official Sections== ===In Competition=== The following films were selected for the main competition:{{cite web |title=59.
